paraphrase.headline: Qatar Airways to Resume Flights to Helsinki and Tokyo Haneda from July 15
paraphrase.body: Qatar Airways has announced plans to resume flights to Helsinki and Tokyo Haneda starting July 15, expanding its network to over 160 destinations. The airline will operate four weekly flights to Helsinki, increasing to daily service from August 1. Tokyo Haneda will also receive four weekly flights from July 15. HH Sheikh Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani praised the expansion, according to a statement from the airline.
key_facts: Flights to Helsinki and Tokyo Haneda resume from July 15.
Helsinki: four weekly flights, increasing to daily from August 1.
Tokyo Haneda: four weekly flights from July 15.

gi_applied.what: Normalized 'His Highness the Amir' to 'HH Sheikh Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani'.
Added local-impact angle: network expansion benefits Qatar travelers.
Rewrote headline to avoid tired template, entity-first.
Created key facts bullet list with dates and numbers.
Opened with varied lead: 'Qatar Airways has announced...' instead of formulaic.

factual_grounding.note: GROUNDING verification, NOT fact-checking. This confirms the draft's specifics (names, numbers, dates) trace back to the source brief. It does NOT verify the brief itself is true — if the brief is wrong, the draft can be perfectly grounded and still factually incorrect. Ungrounded specifics are items a reviewer must check before publish.
